2026-04-07T21:57:13.1316080Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m

2026-04-07T21:58:06.4045482Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-07T21:57:52.368743098Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"github","payload":{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"{\"number\":57893,\"title\":\"[Azure.AI.AgentServer.Responses] Flaky test: BgMode_ProviderHasOneCreateAndOneUpdate — race between status visibility and persistence\",\"body\":\"## Bug Report\\n\\n### Test\\n`HandlerDrivenPersistenceTests.BgMode_ProviderHasOneCreateAndOneUpdate`\\n\\n**Package:** `Azure.AI.AgentServer.Responses`\\n**File:** `sdk/agentserver/Azure.AI.AgentServer.Responses/tests/`\\n\\n### Failure\\nThe test intermittently fails with:\\n```\\nAssert.That(calls.Count(c =\\u0026gt; c == \\u0026#34;UpdateResponseAsync\\u0026#34;), Is.EqualTo(1))\\nExpected: 1\\nBut was:  0\\n```\\n\\n### Build Link\\nhttps://dev.azure.com/azure-sdk/29ec6040-b234-4e31-b139-33dc4287b756/_apis/build/builds/6119386/logs/1471\\n\\n### Root Cause Analysis\\n\\nThis is a **race condition between observable state and persistence** in `ResponseOrchestrator`.\\n\\nThe background task has 3 sequential steps in `CreateAsync`:\\n\\n1. **`ProcessEventsAsync`** — processes `ResponseCompletedEvent`, which sets `execution.Response.Status = Completed` **in memory**\\n2. **`EnsureTerminalOrFailAsync`** — no-op since status is already terminal\\n3. **`FinalizeExecutionAsync`** (in `finally` block) — calls `UpdateResponseAsync` to persist, then `MarkCompleted`\\n\\nThe test polls `GET /responses/{id}` via `WaitForBackgroundCompletionAsync`. The GET handler (`ResponseOrchestrator.GetAsync`) reads the in-flight `execution.Response` via `_tracker.TryGet` and returns a snapshot.\\n\\n**The race window:** The response status becomes `Completed` at step 1 (during event processing), but `UpdateResponseAsync` isn\\u0026#39;t called until step 3 (in the `finally` block). If the test\\u0026#39;s GET poll reads the in-memory status between steps 1 and 3:\\n\\n```\\nBackground Thread:              Test Thread (polling GET):\\n──────────────────              ──────────────────────────\\n1. ProcessEventsAsync\\n   → Status = \\u0026#34;Completed\\u0026#34;\\n   in memory                    GET → sees \\u0026#34;Completed\\u0026#34; → stops polling\\n                                Asserts _spy.Calls → UpdateResponseAsync NOT YET CALLED → FAIL\\n2. EnsureTerminalOrFailAsync\\n3. FinalizeExecutionAsync\\n   └── UpdateResponseAsync      (too late — test already asserted)\\n   └── MarkCompleted\\n```\\n\\n### Why It\\u0026#39;s Intermittent\\nWhen the background task completes steps 1→3 between poll intervals, the test passes. When the test thread gets scheduled between steps 1 and 3, it fails.\\n\\n### Suggested Fix\\nThe structural fix is to not expose a terminal status externally until `FinalizeExecutionAsync` completes. For example, `GetAsync` could gate on `MarkCompleted` having run, or the response status should not be set to `Completed` until after persistence finishes.\\n\\nAlternatively, the test could await the background execution task or retry-poll the spy calls after seeing completion.\",\"state\":\"open\",\"html_url\":\"https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/57893\",\"user\":{\"login\":\"m-nash\",\"id\":64171366,\"profile_url\":\"https://github.com/m-nash\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/64171366?v=4\"},\"author_association\":\"MEMBER\",\"labels\":[\"Client\",\"AI Agents\"],\"reactions\":{\"total_count\":1,\"+1\":0,\"-1\":0,\"laugh\":0,\"confused\":0,\"heart\":0,\"hooray\":0,\"rocket\":0,\"eyes\":1},\"created_at\":\"2026-04-07T21:55:12Z\",\"updated_at\":\"2026-04-07T21:55:12Z\"}","type":"text"}]}}}
2026-04-07T21:58:06.4059096Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-07T21:57:52.381621472Z","direction":"OUT","type":"REQUEST","server_id":"github","method":"tools/call","payload":{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"arguments":{"issue_number":57893,"method":"get","owner":"Azure","repo":"azure-sdk-for-net"},"name":"issue_read"}}}
2026-04-07T21:58:06.4074269Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-07T21:57:52.628053971Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"github","payload":{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"{\"number\":57893,\"title\":\"[Azure.AI.AgentServer.Responses] Flaky test: BgMode_ProviderHasOneCreateAndOneUpdate — race between status visibility and persistence\",\"body\":\"## Bug Report\\n\\n### Test\\n`HandlerDrivenPersistenceTests.BgMode_ProviderHasOneCreateAndOneUpdate`\\n\\n**Package:** `Azure.AI.AgentServer.Responses`\\n**File:** `sdk/agentserver/Azure.AI.AgentServer.Responses/tests/`\\n\\n### Failure\\nThe test intermittently fails with:\\n```\\nAssert.That(calls.Count(c =\\u0026gt; c == \\u0026#34;UpdateResponseAsync\\u0026#34;), Is.EqualTo(1))\\nExpected: 1\\nBut was:  0\\n```\\n\\n### Build Link\\nhttps://dev.azure.com/azure-sdk/29ec6040-b234-4e31-b139-33dc4287b756/_apis/build/builds/6119386/logs/1471\\n\\n### Root Cause Analysis\\n\\nThis is a **race condition between observable state and persistence** in `ResponseOrchestrator`.\\n\\nThe background task has 3 sequential steps in `CreateAsync`:\\n\\n1. **`ProcessEventsAsync`** — processes `ResponseCompletedEvent`, which sets `execution.Response.Status = Completed` **in memory**\\n2. **`EnsureTerminalOrFailAsync`** — no-op since status is already terminal\\n3. **`FinalizeExecutionAsync`** (in `finally` block) — calls `UpdateResponseAsync` to persist, then `MarkCompleted`\\n\\nThe test polls `GET /responses/{id}` via `WaitForBackgroundCompletionAsync`. The GET handler (`ResponseOrchestrator.GetAsync`) reads the in-flight `execution.Response` via `_tracker.TryGet` and returns a snapshot.\\n\\n**The race window:** The response status becomes `Completed` at step 1 (during event processing), but `UpdateResponseAsync` isn\\u0026#39;t called until step 3 (in the `finally` block). If the test\\u0026#39;s GET poll reads the in-memory status between steps 1 and 3:\\n\\n```\\nBackground Thread:              Test Thread (polling GET):\\n──────────────────              ──────────────────────────\\n1. ProcessEventsAsync\\n   → Status = \\u0026#34;Completed\\u0026#34;\\n   in memory                    GET → sees \\u0026#34;Completed\\u0026#34; → stops polling\\n                                Asserts _spy.Calls → UpdateResponseAsync NOT YET CALLED → FAIL\\n2. EnsureTerminalOrFailAsync\\n3. FinalizeExecutionAsync\\n   └── UpdateResponseAsync      (too late — test already asserted)\\n   └── MarkCompleted\\n```\\n\\n### Why It\\u0026#39;s Intermittent\\nWhen the background task completes steps 1→3 between poll intervals, the test passes. When the test thread gets scheduled between steps 1 and 3, it fails.\\n\\n### Suggested Fix\\nThe structural fix is to not expose a terminal status externally until `FinalizeExecutionAsync` completes. For example, `GetAsync` could gate on `MarkCompleted` having run, or the response status should not be set to `Completed` until after persistence finishes.\\n\\nAlternatively, the test could await the background execution task or retry-poll the spy calls after seeing completion.\",\"state\":\"open\",\"html_url\":\"https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/57893\",\"user\":{\"login\":\"m-nash\",\"id\":64171366,\"profile_url\":\"https://github.com/m-nash\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/64171366?v=4\"},\"author_association\":\"MEMBER\",\"labels\":[\"Client\",\"AI Agents\"],\"reactions\":{\"total_count\":1,\"+1\":0,\"-1\":0,\"laugh\":0,\"confused\":0,\"heart\":0,\"hooray\":0,\"rocket\":0,\"eyes\":1},\"created_at\":\"2026-04-07T21:55:12Z\",\"updated_at\":\"2026-04-07T21:55:12Z\"}","type":"text"}]}}}
